case_title: NORELLI, ANDREW VS GDA HOLDING, INC DBA GDA PARK

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 25578, RECORD TRANSFERRED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $894.18 FILED BY NORELLI, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT GDA HOLDING, INC DBA GDA PARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORELLI, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GDA HOLDING, INC DBA GDA PARK $894.18 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $940.18 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
